$comment: Template for .sync-state.json at the repo root. Committed per-branch. Edit the real file, not this one.

$field_notes.branch_mode: release on `main` branch, nightly on `nightly` branch.
$field_notes.base_release_tag: The parent release tag this branch builds atop. Same on both branches — main has shipped this version live, nightly is accumulating drafts on top of it.
$field_notes.base_release_sha: Parent commit SHA at base_release_tag. Used as the diff base for ALL runs (cumulative diff). Both modes diff `base_release_sha → target`.
$field_notes.last_seen_parent_sha: Informational only — the parent main HEAD at the last nightly run. Lets us tell the user how many new commits exist. NOT used as a diff base.
$field_notes.last_applied_manifest_hash: Hash of the manifest from the last applied run. Lets us detect when entries have DISAPPEARED from the cumulative diff (i.e. a revert landed) so we can flag previously-applied doc edits for reconciliation.
